ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Company's market capitalization */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the company was listed on the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last trading price of the day */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous closing price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous close */,
  "percent_gain" REAL /* Percentage gain from the previous close */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status of the stock */,
  "fifty_two_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "fifty_two_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, premium, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "preferred_companies" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred company tickers */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Percentage change threshold for alerts */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the preferences were last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, news update) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the alert (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "dismissed" INTEGER /* Dismissed status of the alert (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, view stock price) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "fin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial statement */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the financial statement (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_executives" (
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the executive */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the executive (e.g., CEO, CFO, director) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the executive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_executives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
